ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_SOW_FR_FD_PT1_20201022
ddt:Target.Description:
[9]Oct 22nd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Changed file name.
[8]Aug 31st, 2020 Nissan XX6 Added CF items, based on Rev3.
[7]Mar 5th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified two devices, based on Rev1.
[6]Feb 27th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Deleted Config items, based on Rev5.
[5]Feb 24th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Config/DM/DTC items, based on Rev5.
[4]Dec 3rd, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified DM and Config data, based on Rev4.
[3]Nov 29th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Config data, Little Endian to Big Endian. Based on Rev3. 1. Config data 2. Communication protocol(DiagOnCAN-FD=> DiagOnCAN)
[2]Nov 19th 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified some config data.(Big Endian to Little Endian.)
[1]Nov 7th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added/Modified Config data, based on Rev1.
[N]Oct 31st, 2019 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation, based on RevN.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: (TBD)Overwrite (Inital alignment has been done via DID write operation)(04h)
(TBD)Last attempt to perform Inital calibration was not sucessfull (To be retained in NVM over operation cycles)(05h)
(TBD)Reserved (Initial alignment reset to default state due to Internal failure)(06h)
(TBD)Stationnary Alignment angle Out of range Target Outside Tolerance(04h)
(TBD)Target Outside Tolerance Stationnary Alignment angle Out of range(05h)

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Item.Text: (TBD)Overwrite (Inital alignment has been done via DID write operation)(04h)
(TBD)Last attempt to perform Inital calibration was not sucessfull (To be retained in NVM over operation cycles)(05h)
(TBD)Reserved (Initial alignment reset to default state due to Internal failure)(06h)
